name: holders
description: Given a Solana SPL mint, report a holder concentration snapshot: total supply, the largest token accounts (top 20 max), and top-N concentration percent.

mint.description: base58 SPL mint address to snapshot

top.description: N for the headline concentration figure; default 10, clamped to [1,20] since getTokenLargestAccounts returns at most 20

config.description: optional overrides, e.g. { HELIUS_RPC_URL }; otherwise env then public mainnet fallback

total_supply.description: uiAmount of total supply from getTokenSupply

accounts_returned.description: how many largest token accounts came back (0 to 20)

top_n.description: N actually used for the headline figure (min of requested top and accounts_returned)

top_n_concentration_pct.description: percent of total supply held by the top N largest token accounts; null if supply is zero

top_20_concentration_pct.description: percent held by all returned accounts (the largest-20 view); null if supply is zero

top.description: rows [{ rank, address, amount, pct_of_supply }]; address is the TOKEN ACCOUNT, not the owner wallet

caveat.description: states the top-20 limit and that rows are token accounts, not owners, and not a holder count

config.HELIUS_RPC_URL: <env HELIUS_RPC_URL at runtime, never committed; falls back to https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com when unset>
